requirementCueLines: (OR CSE 142 Programming I OR CSE 122 Intro to Programming II)
**Student completing the Nanoscience and Molecular Engineering (NME) degree option must enroll in NME 220 during Spring of sophomore or junior year.
**Student completing the Nanoscience and Molecular Engineering (NME) degree option must enroll in NME 220 during Spring sophomore to declare before Autumn of the following academic year.
12 credits of written and oral communication
24 credits in Arts and Humanities (A&H), Social Sciences (SSc), and Diversity (DIV).

A maximum of 9 credits in 400-level courses in the following departments will satisfy the technical electives requirement. 500-level courses (except seminar) in these departments will also satisfy this requirement, but the MSE undergraduate adviser will need to update your degree audit manually.
A minimum of 6 credits in MSE 400-level courses listed below are required. MSE 500-level courses (except seminar) will also satisfy the minimum of 6 credits in MSE technical electives.
Arts & Humanities OR Social Sciences (4 additional cr.)
